Cloudy Potion  
 


EXPENDABLE Charges: 1
Effect: Invisibility (Any Slot, Casting Time: Instant) as Level 60
WT: 0.8 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Cloudy Potion

EXPENDABLE Charges: 1
Effect: Invisibility (Any Slot, Casting Time: Instant) as Level 60
WT: 0.8 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL

Item Type:Potion
Stackable:20
Merchant Value:5 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:5
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:Gidono
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-11-27 19:16:56
Page Updated:Tue Jul 15th, 2025

Expansion: Shadows of Luclin
Average Price: 13pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 1

Post Comment
2022
QuoteReply
# Jul 25 2022 at 8:56 AM Rating: Good
Xanfi
Scholar
39 posts
As of Kunark release on Yelinak you can buy these in EFP from Filrion Dokius and Palrion Enieus, even though their pages here on Alla say they are not on TLP until Luclin. They are there right now 1 week after Kunark release, not sure if they were there during classic or not. They are not in the find window. They are both located slightly northeast of the northern most WFP zone line in EFP.

Edited, May 25th 2024 1:23am by Xanfi
▲ Page top
2022
QuoteReply
# Jun 21 2023 at 11:10 AM Rating: Decent
Marque01
5 posts
Xanfi, I can confirm for you that merchant Palrion Enieus (General Supplies) has the cloudy potions right where you said he would be. 12p 9g for an ugly Dwarf like me but they are 100% in the original game.

I am currently on Oakwynd and Original is the only expansion that is unlocked :) thank you. I can now snag my Xicotl piece for my Soulfire and maybe even sneak down into the Splitpaw lair to visit with Brother Hayle :)

Thanks again for your tip.
▲ Page top
Cloudy potion in Shadow Haven
QuoteReply
# Jan 06 2017 at 3:38 PM Rating: Good
trozkat66
Scholar
107 posts
Zimloro Jalobottle sells cloudy potion in the back of the gnome rogue guild area off the swimming pool in Shadow Haven . You need to do the Amulet of the Haven (Merchant Quest) for Zimloro to deal with you, evil chars maybe numerous times. Koburn MacFuller is just outside the entrance from the bazaar in a room above Defender Dutrolian and isn't picky about customers.

Quote:
This item can be Vendor Purchased:

Abysmal Sea
Duath Untez @ -60, 240, 98
Dray Cuves @ -156, 180, 114
Yoen Ormard @ 107, 19, 98, in the hold
Lita Hegeway @ 118, -53, 98, in the hold
Tasec Dreeng @ -80, 205, 98, in the hold

Ak'Anon
Rylin Coil @ 1469, -190, -104, at bottom of waterfall
a clockwork alchemist @ 891, -301, -26, In lower level of the first tower on the lake near Ak'anon Palace

Cabilis West
Jondin @ -36, 508, 4

Chardok
Haggle Baron Dry`dn @ -93, 351, -293

Crescent Reach
Merchant Kaphiri @ -1470, -1614, -88
Innkeeper Seltu @ -1527, -1564, -86
Alchemist Naeema @ -1427, -1590, 34
Merchant Wyn`las @ -1404, -1520, -88
Geerlok Clockwork Merchant IV @ -1271, -1268, -87
Merchant Oseye @ -1448, -1616, -55
Merchant Odimari @ -1355, -1627, -88, Duplicate of the other Odimari, may have been replaced by Merchant Asamu with different stock
Merchant Odimari @ -1168, -1486, -88

East Freeport
Farista Eniatia @ 97, 119, 26
Palrion Enieus @ 262, 198, 31
Eroncil Rellyus @ 292, 199, 31
Filrion Dokius @ 52, 268, 30

Erudin Palace
Sharin Denuen @ 661, 539, -10, In Vials of Vitality, bottom floor of Palace

Firiona Vie
Shrub Marwood @ 956, -3323, 160

Grobb
Raztara @ 441, -392, -2

Gulf of Gunthak
Kwyllon Geerlok @ 1502, -216, 3, in the lighthouse

Halas
Murtog MacYee @ 124, -364, 6, inside Yee Majik

Kelethin (in Greater Faydark)
Merchant Kaeluase @ -272, 51, 119, EQAtlas platform #17
Merchant Ueaas @ -85, 601, 119, Near bank (EQAtlas platform #12)

Lavastorm Mountains
Kicha @ 3087, -292, 37
Wayfarers Mercenary Athir @ 2276, -30, 70
Sasily Verous @ 3635, 480, -12

Neriak - Commons
Marza T`Kix @ 20, -875, -50, Bounty of the Earth, Neriak Down Under

Neriak - Foreign Quarter
Gambel Quick @ 253, -60, 19, In Gambels Greens

Plane of Knowledge
MiraFrostpouch @ -89, -216, -156, In a building in the eastern section of town, near Plane of Tranquility port stone

Plane of Tranquility
Gregory Maligus @ 627, -1847, -907

Rivervale
Bimble Babbinsbort @ -162, -118, -21
Kizzie Mintopp @ -229, -217, -1
Byl Babbinsbort @ -146, -114, -9

Sanctus Seru
Vassa Nar @ -806, 485, 59
Laltar Valka @ -18, -1490, 59
Qearin Softbark @ -828, -947, 59

Shadow Haven
Kolburn Inglewort @ 174, 630, -44
ZimlorJalobottle @ -419, 1428, -54

Shar Vahl
Alchemist Hikal @ -270, -377, -187, Building next tbank, with a candle on the sign

South Kaladim
Baldoleky Rockfinder @ 254, -186, 4

South Qeynos
Khensol Undesta @ 288, -623, 6, Inside casters' guild
Caleah Herblender @ 313, -559, 6, Inside The Herb Jar
Drawna Opimsor @ 303, -550, 6, Inside the Herb Jar

Southern Felwithe
Merchant Yisasan @ 448, -805, -2, inside merchant building

Thurgadin
Frundle Frenkler @ -390, 505, -20, Inside unnamed building next tThe Holy Harbinger

Undershore
Free Trader Zentril @ -631, -862, 46
Free Trader Tivlin @ -632, -822, 45
Free Trader Ranfisar @ -552, -824, 45

West Freeport
Ilolista Enitia @ 1411, -1631, -197

__DEL__1592248697882
3 posts
I heard that this could be made by a shammy... is this true? cant find recipe so I dont think it is but just wanted to double check.

▲ Page top
RE: makeable?
QuoteReply
# Aug 08 2005 at 11:56 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361898146
View User Forum
Scholar
110 posts
Nope, but a Shammy can make Essence of Consealment but that is a pain to make due to the foraged portion only found in LDoN Guk.
Then again it the essence potion can be made into a 10 dose & sells in bazaar - but costs !!!

QuoteReply
# Jul 04 2005 at 9:19 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591780143482
176 posts
Poison Vendor in POK sells this near the POT stone. Use Find for poison supplies. He's the barbarian selling poison supplies in the building with the NPC that unlocks PoP flag memories.

Cloudy potions problem
QuoteReply
# Oct 01 2004 at 5:58 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591790790706
8 posts
there is one problem with the potions though....it seems that if you drink more then say 5 in a session you get a message that says "Any further potion consumption would be toxic to your system" I had 4 invis last less then 2 minutes and then got this message for the next several hours.....so be forwarned.
▲ Page top
Not Combinable
QuoteReply
# May 02 2004 at 10:41 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592257332209
15 posts
Tried to combine with my shaman in foldable Bear Skin Bag and it would not combine said cannot combine in this container which means its not a valid combine. god forbid that SOE makes a vendor selable item that shamans could benefit from could sell a 10 shot easy for 150pp

just wrong just wrong

Hate you sony
▲ Page top
RE: Not Combinable
QuoteReply
# May 02 2004 at 11:26 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592344491328
Sage
150 posts
There is and LDon Alchemy recipie Essence of concealment, these are invis potions shammys can make and then make 5 and 10 shots. They are a bit ,ore expensive than the cloudy potions but do sell well cause will only take up one inventory slot for the multi doses.

Cloudy Potion
QuoteReply
# Nov 28 2003 at 11:05 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592761168928
94 posts
This potion is awsome, helped me in a tuff situation in Skyshrine where i made a little mistake. Worth every copper i paid for em.


Now if only Invis didnt drop when you loot your corpse ;)
▲ Page top
Insta click?
QuoteReply
# Sep 09 2003 at 11:55 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1649636240944
40 posts
With these being Instant click, does right clicking one of these make you appear that poof real fast? or is it like refreshing your Invis without going live?

Either way, i love these potions, i Buy at least 10 of them when we kill stuff where it is essential, also saves the invisers time and paitence, if there is one thing my druid hates, its having to Re-invis someone in the middle of a room full of Red mobs that can kill in 1 quad hit,

Also, you can buy them in shadowhaven in the hut up the stairs from bazaar and to the left, cost me around 9pp with my opal steins (116 cha), pretty cheap for how useful they are.

Forgive my spelling, 5am here 8(

Edited, Wed Sep 10 00:43:30 2003
▲ Page top
RE: Insta click?
QuoteReply
# Sep 10 2003 at 2:37 AM Rating: Decent
KyrosKrane
Guru
385 posts
You can right-click these while running and it will work fine. Also, if you have an old invis (either from a cast or potion) starting to fade, you can click a potion to drink it without ever losing invis -- KOS mobs won't see you.
____________________________
--
Sir KyrosKrane Sylvanblade
Luclin (Veeshan) Server
Lord, Lightbringer, and Redeemer in the service of Erollisi Marr

# May 12 2003 at 10:04 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592254959136
42 posts
At the timestamp of this message, Caleah Herblender did not have Cloudy Potion for sale.

There had probably been no one in her shop for hours.

Drawna Opimsor, standing close to Caleah, had plenty for sale.

I con indifferent to Drawna with 90CHA. I'm a human Paladin with ally PoL faction. Drawna's price to me was 10P 5G 9S 3C per Cloudy Potion.

Best regards,

Tim ==

Rivervale location
QuoteReply
# Jul 11 2002 at 8:55 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592758688337
View User Forum
Guru
216 posts
Rivervale doesn't have them. There's a potion vendor in town - if you're standing with your back to the door of the Fool's Gold, the door is to your left. Then you'll slope down into a room where the vendor is.

Edited, Sat Jul 13 22:09:10 2002

QuoteReply
# Nov 06 2003 at 11:17 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592247179407
View User Forum
Scholar
155 posts
LOL, I would buy that the MAX duration is 20 mins but they aren't guarunteed. I used a good number of these back in the old days of going to Lake of Ill Omen and it is VERY common for them to wear off 10 seconds after you drink them=) I have swallowed more than one of the nasty liquids only to have it wear off before I even moved:-)

potions

Tried these with my cleric. They are not random like casters , but don't seem to last very long either. VERY worth it for classes who cannot cast invis. Bought mine in Thurg for around 11p 2gp. but I have seen them all over.
